title: Bridge Essay: Love and compassion meditation: a nondual perspective.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Love and compassion meditation: anondual perspective.** — Ann N Y Acad Sci. PMID: 27152716. DOI: 10.1111/nyas.13078. This paper discusses meditation from the unique perspective of the nondual approach and explores the possible relevance of this approach to applications of love and compassion meditation in clinical settings. It contrasts the nondual approach with the better known gradual or goal-oriented, dualistic view of meditation.
